l1-001.title: Three Things You Like
l1-001.text: Take turns naming three details you like about your partner tonight. After sharing, give them one slow hug.

l1-002.title: Palm Warmth
l1-002.text: Hold your partner's hand for 60 seconds. Just look at each other, with no rush to speak.

l1-003.title: Tonight's Boundaries
l1-003.text: Each person shares one thing they want to try tonight and one thing they want to keep off-limits.

l1-004.title: Move Closer Slowly
l1-004.text: One person moves closer and stops where the other feels comfortable. Let a nod decide whether to come closer.

l1-005.title: Soft Whisper
l1-005.text: Move close to your partner's ear and softly say one thing you have wanted to tell them today.

l1-006.title: Scent Exchange
l1-006.text: Choose a scent or clothing detail on you and invite your partner to come close and notice it for 20 seconds.

l1-007.title: Pause Word
l1-007.text: Decide tonight's pause word together. If either person says it, everything stops and turns into hugging or talking.

l1-008.title: Shoulder And Neck Ease
l1-008.text: Relax your partner's shoulders and neck for 90 seconds. Let them adjust the pressure from 1 to 5.

l1-009.title: Eye Contact
l1-009.text: Look at each other for 30 seconds. When it ends, each person shares the strongest feeling they noticed.

l1-010.title: Warm-Up Combo
l1-010.text: The system will create a gentle task for you.

l1-011.title: Comfort Score
l1-011.text: Each person rates their current relaxation from 1 to 5. The lower score gets to request one comfort adjustment.

l1-012.title: Palm Pause
l1-012.text: Place your hand on your partner's palm for 30 seconds. Let them decide whether to hold, relax, or change position.

l1-013.title: One Moment Of Longing
l1-013.text: Share the most recent moment when you wanted to be close to your partner. Be as specific as possible.

l1-014.title: Pour Slowly
l1-014.text: Pour water or prepare a small item for your partner while keeping eye contact and a slow pace.

l1-015.title: Today's Switch
l1-015.text: Each person shares one thing that would help them relax today. The other person only listens and repeats it back.

l1-016.title: Hair Ends Or Fingertips
l1-016.text: Choose hair ends or fingertips and give your partner 45 seconds of very light touch.

l1-017.title: Safety Signals
l1-017.text: Set three short responses together: continue, slower, pause. You can use them directly for every card after this.

l1-018.title: Ten Centimeters Closer
l1-018.text: Sit ten centimeters closer for 20 seconds, then one person says whether they want to stay, move closer, or move back.

l2-001.title: Only Honesty
l2-001.text: Say one small thing you want your partner to do more of tonight, and let them choose whether to accept.

l2-002.title: Fingertip Route
l2-002.text: Use your fingertip to draw a slow route on your partner's arm or back and let them guess the pattern.

l2-003.title: Three Steps Closer
l2-003.text: Move closer to your partner three times, pausing each time until they give clear consent.

l2-004.title: One Command
l2-004.text: In a gentle but certain voice, ask your partner to do one simple and comfortable thing.

l2-005.title: Slow Hug
l2-005.text: Hug your partner from the front or behind for 45 seconds and let your breathing slowly sync.

l2-006.title: Like List
l2-006.text: Each person names three situations that turn them on more, then the other chooses one to keep talking about.

l2-007.title: Dim The Lights
l2-007.text: Adjust the lighting, music, or sitting position so the space feels like it belongs only to the two of you.

l2-008.title: Stop At The Edge
l2-008.text: Choose a comfortable kind of touch, continue for 30 seconds, then stop and let your partner decide whether to continue.

l2-009.title: Tonight's Keywords
l2-009.text: Each person gives tonight one keyword, such as slow, naughty, sweet, or brave. Combine the two words into tonight's rule.

l2-010.title: Heating-Up Combo
l2-010.text: The system will create a warmer task for you.

l2-011.title: Preference Exchange
l2-011.text: Each person shares one pace they like and one they dislike. The other person confirms it in their own words.

l2-012.title: Pause Three Seconds
l2-012.text: Choose a comfortable way to move closer. After each move, pause for three seconds and let your partner decide the next step.

l2-013.title: Tonight's Tone
l2-013.text: Ask your partner to choose the tone they want to hear tonight: gentle, certain, playful, or a little naughty.

l2-014.title: Switch The Lead
l2-014.text: For the next card, the person who is usually less active decides when to start and when to end.

l2-015.title: Over The Fabric
l2-015.text: Over clothing, choose an agreed spot and stay there for 30 seconds. Let your partner decide pressure and distance.

l2-016.title: One Invitation
l2-016.text: Use no more than ten words to invite your partner closer. They may accept, modify, or skip.

l2-017.title: Change Position
l2-017.text: Change your sitting or standing position and look at each other from a new angle for 20 seconds.

l2-018.title: How To Soothe Me
l2-018.text: Share how you want your partner to comfort you tonight if you become shy or nervous.

l3-001.title: Bold Invitation
l3-001.text: Say one way you want your partner to lead you tonight, then let them set the timing and pace.

l3-002.title: Temporarily Yours
l3-002.text: One person closes their eyes for 45 seconds while the other uses only voice to guide comfortable movement or stillness.

l3-003.title: No Escaping
l3-003.text: Your partner asks three intimate questions and you answer honestly. Any question can be skipped with the pause word.

l3-004.title: Unbearably Slow
l3-004.text: Choose an agreed intimate touch and slow it to half your usual speed for 60 seconds.

l3-005.title: A Naughtier Name
l3-005.text: Each person chooses one nickname or form of address they accept tonight, only during the game.

l3-006.title: Three-Minute Rule
l3-006.text: For the next three minutes, one person decides the pace. The other can say slower, pause, or continue at any time.

l3-007.title: Countdown By The Ear
l3-007.text: Move close to your partner's ear and count slowly from 10 to 1, leaving a little silence between each number.

l3-008.title: Command And Response
l3-008.text: One person gives an intimate command that is not explicit and can be done immediately. The other may accept, modify, or skip.

l3-009.title: Hot Combo
l3-009.text: The system will create a bolder task for you.

l3-010.title: Private Combo
l3-010.text: The system will create a task that belongs only to this moment.

l3-011.title: Lead Declaration
l3-011.text: One person clearly but gently states the pace they want to lead next. The other confirms whether they accept.

l3-012.title: Close, No Touch
l3-012.text: Move close enough to feel each other's breath and hold for 30 seconds, without touching yet.

l3-013.title: Only Three Answers
l3-013.text: Your partner asks three questions about tonight's preferences. You can only answer like it, slower, or skip.

l3-014.title: Ten Seconds In The Dark
l3-014.text: Dim the lights or close your eyes for 10 seconds. When you open them, name the first reason you want to be closer.

l3-015.title: A Little Naughtier
l3-015.text: Turn your previous compliment into a bolder version. If your partner laughs, say it again.

l3-016.title: You Call Stop
l3-016.text: Choose an agreed intimate way to move closer. The receiving person decides when to call stop.

l3-017.title: Voice Only
l3-017.text: For the next 60 seconds, guide your partner only with your voice, without gestures. Let them choose whether to follow.

l3-018.title: Final Choice
l3-018.text: Make a bold but adjustable invitation and let your partner keep the final choice.

combo-001.title: Soft Light Combo
combo-001.text: The system will create an intimate task for you.

combo-002.title: Tipsy Combo
combo-002.text: The system will create an intimate task for you.

combo-003.title: Signal Combo
combo-003.text: The system will create an intimate task for you.

combo-004.title: Late Night Combo
combo-004.text: The system will create an intimate task for you.

combo-005.title: Black Gold Combo
combo-005.text: The system will create an intimate task for you.
